_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Strikingly, Lats1/2-iDeficient adult mice developed aggressive nerve-associated tumors of Sox10+ SC origin after tamoxifen administration with full penetrance and a shortened life span
details: Lats1/2-iDeficient adult mice developed aggressive nerve-associated tumors of Sox10+ SC origin after tamoxifen administration with full penetrance and shortened life span
